data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Credit rollover for unused time', but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. The linked use case mentions the rollover of unused hours, yet there is no concrete API evidence or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result of confirming the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of credit rollover for unused time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the credit rollover functionality.
